specific_question: In Q1 2024, did the cybersecurity specialist participate in internal meetings to update secure coding guidelines for the MediConn development team?
answer: Yes. The cybersecurity specialist attended 12 meetings between January 1 and March 31, 2024 to review and update secure coding standards for MediConn’s development team.
dr_question: In 2026, since a ransomware attack would not be just an IT issue but a risk to every function of MediConn Solutions, what specific architectural and procedural controls would a cybersecurity specialist need to design and implement to minimize the blast radius and ensure MediConn’s clinical continuity during an extended loss of services from one of their third-party providers?
